message:
Command `# The nc_chipgen runs padframe-gen via `build` subcommand. Let me check the build subcommand
grep -n "def build\|build_wrapper_def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/main.py | head -10
grep -rn "def build\b\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "# The nc_chipgen runs padframe-gen via `build` subcommand. Let me check the build subcommand\ngrep -n \"def build\\|build_wrapper_def\" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/main.py | head -10\ngrep -rn \"def build\\b\\|core.def\" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v \".pyc\" | head -10"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
148:    # 2. Core DEF placeholder path (overwritten by build_wrapper_def in full_flow)
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:36:def _verify_def_verilog_sync(core_def: Path, core_v: Path) -> None:
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:37:    """Verify core.def and core.v have identical pin/port sets.
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:41:    with open(core_def) as f:
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:60:                f"{len(in_v_not_def)} port(s) in core.v but not core.def: "
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:66:                f"{len(in_def_not_v)} pin(s) in core.def but not core.v: "
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:70:            "core.def / core.v pin mismatch!\n  " + "\n  ".join(parts)
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:75:            f"✓ core.def ↔ core.v pin check passed ({len(def_pins)} pins in sync)",
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:80:    # Verify core.def DIEAREA starts at origin
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:88:                f"core.def DIEAREA origin is ({x0}, {y0}), expected (0, 0)"
/nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/full_flow.py:91:            click.style("✓ core.def origin is (0, 0)", fg="green")

extras.command:
# The nc_chipgen runs padframe-gen via `build` subcommand. Let me check the build subcommand
grep -n "def build\|build_wrapper_def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padgen/main.py | head -10
grep -rn "def build\b\|core.def" /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -10
